subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! The lamp of the horizons is aflame and radiant, and the Word of God, which must be obeyed, is even as the sun [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر میثاق شمع آفاق در شعله و اشراق است و کلمه الله المطاعه چون آفتاب
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @firmness in the Covenant, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
